hooks.command: bash -c 'echo ""; echo "═══ PIPELINE STATE RECOVERY (post-compaction) ═══"; found=0; for f in /c/Users/mateo/Desktop/*/.pipeline-state.md; do if [ -f "$f" ]; then echo ""; cat "$f"; found=1; fi; done; if [ $found -eq 0 ]; then echo "No active pipeline found."; fi; echo "═══════════════════════════════════════════════"'
bash -c 'for f in /c/Users/mateo/Desktop/*/.pipeline-state.md; do if [ -f "$f" ]; then echo ""; echo "═══ ACTIVE PIPELINE DETECTED ═══"; cat "$f"; echo "═══════════════════════════════"; fi; done'

bash -c 'FILE="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "/src/" && ! echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "_project-scaffold"; then DOCS_DIR=$(echo "$FILE" | sed "s|/src/.*|/docs/|"); if [ ! -f "${DOCS_DIR}tokens.md" ] || [ ! -f "${DOCS_DIR}sections.md" ]; then echo ""; echo "[V4 GATE] Design docs missing. Run Designer teammate first."; echo "  Required: docs/tokens.md + docs/sections.md"; fi; fi'

bash -c 'FILE="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.vue$"; then ISSUES=""; grep -q "import axios" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && ISSUES="$ISSUES
  - AXIOS direct import: use service layer"; grep -qE "gsap\.(to|from|fromTo).*?(width|height|top|left|right|bottom)[^T]" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && ISSUES="$ISSUES
  - Animating layout property: use transform/opacity only"; grep -qE "will-change" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && ISSUES="$ISSUES
  - will-change detected: remove preventive usage"; if [ -n "$ISSUES" ]; then echo ""; echo "[ANTI-PATTERN]"; echo -e "$ISSUES"; fi; fi'
